Brent_Crude.current_view: Base case holds. OPEC+ compliance and Fed path are the swing factors.

Bull.label: Supply disruption / OPEC+ surprise cut
Bull.trigger: Hormuz escalation or deeper-than-expected OPEC+ cut

Base.label: Managed balance — OPEC+ extensions hold
Base.trigger: OPEC+ maintains cuts, demand grows at IEA baseline

Bear.label: Demand miss + OPEC fracture
Bear.trigger: Global slowdown or Saudi market share defence

Tail.label: Full OPEC collapse / global recession
Tail.trigger: Simultaneous quota abandonment and financial crisis

history.view: Base case holds. OPEC+ compliance and Fed path are the swing factors.

JKM_LNG.current_view: South Asian demand constrained by FX. Corridor freight economics are the key variable.

Bull.label: Cold snap + East African supply delay
Bull.trigger: Weather event + Mozambique LNG restart delayed further

Base.label: Moderate demand, adequate supply
Base.trigger: Qatar contracts hold, Australian LNG stable

Bear.label: Mild weather + oversupply
Bear.trigger: Warm Asian winter, US LNG export surge

history.view: South Asian demand constrained by FX. Corridor freight economics are the key variable.
